name: crypt
summary: The honored (or forgotten) dead. Silence, stone, dust. Tombs against the walls, candles between them.

primary_palette.note: a small family crypt — 4 tombs, wall-aligned
upright stones — mass grave or martyrs' memorial
single saintly relic as the focal point

story_prompts: first crypt in two centuries to be disturbed — dust still on the air
a family crypt used beyond capacity, fresh and old dead stacked
a saint's tomb with pilgrim offerings layered over generations
desecrated crypt, tombs smashed open, contents missing
anti_patterns: no warm light sources — crypts are pale, cold, or unlit
tombs against walls, not floating in the middle (unless one central ruler's tomb)
central floor stays open — mourners need to walk
